card.name: Prepared Precon Decklist PRP
card.text: 3x Colorstorm Stallion 2x Rimebound Reindeer 3x Rallied Champions 3x Wayfaring Kirin 3x Nautila, Seapony 4x Time Looper 4x Outland Axebearer 2x Tale Scourer 3x Soarer's Talent 2x Globeify 2x Burst Lightning 2x Negate 3x Festival of Lightning 1x Skycoach Waypoint

card.name: Burst Lightning
card.text: Kicker {4} (You may pay an additional {4} as you cast this spell.) Burst Lightning deals 2 damage to any target. If this spell was kicked, it deals 4 damage instead.

card.name: Nautila, Seapony // Consider
card.text:
Whenever Nautila becomes tapped, you may discard a card. If you do, Nautila becomes prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.)
---
Surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.) Draw a card.

card.name: Time Looper
card.text: Paradox — Whenever you cast a spell from anywhere other than your hand, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. (Prepared spells are cast from exile.)

card.name: Rimebound Reindeer // Freeze Solid
card.text:
This creature enters prepared. Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, draw a card, then discard a card.
---
Choose one — • Tap target creature. • Target creature can't be blocked this turn.

card.name: Colorstorm Stallion
card.text: Ward {1}, haste Opus — Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn. If five or more mana was spent to cast that spell, create a token that's a copy of this creature.

card.name: Tale Scourer // Dredge Up
card.text:
Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, it becomes prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.)
---
Exile target instant or sorcery card from your graveyard. Copy it. You may cast the copy.

card.name: Wayfaring Kirin // Ember of Emotion
card.text:
Prowess (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.) Whenever you cast your second spell each turn, this creature becomes prepared.
---
Creatures you control get +1/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Rallied Champions // Endless Assault
card.text:
This creature enters prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.)
---
Untap each creature you control that attacked this turn. After this phase, there is an additional combat phase.

card.name: Globeify
card.text: Flash Enchant creature Enchanted creature loses all abilities and is a colorless Golem with base power and toughness 1/1. (It loses all colors and all other creature types.)

card.name: Festival of Lightning
card.text: Festival of Lightning deals 5 damage to target creature or planeswalker. Exile the top card of your library. You may play it this turn.

card.name: Soarer's Talent
card.text: (Gain the next level as a sorcery to add its ability.) When this Class enters, put a flying counter on up to one target creature you control. {U}{R} Level 2 Noncreature spells you cast cost {1} less to cast. {1}{R} Level 3 When this Class becomes level 3, Exile the top two cards of your library. Until end of turn, you may play those cards.

card.name: Skycoach Waypoint
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {3},{T}: Target creature becomes prepared. (Only creatures with prepare spells can become prepared.)

card.name: Outland Axebearer // At the Ready
card.text:
First strike, haste This creature enters prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.)
---
Target creature you control gets +2/+0 until end of turn.
